title: RBI (Urban Co-operative Banks – Responsible Business Conduct) Second Amendment Directions, 2026
description:
The RBI has issued detailed guidelines governing the marketing and sale of financial products by UCBs. The framework focuses on preventing mis-selling and strengthening customer safeguards.
The post RBI (Urban Co-operative Banks – Responsible Business Conduct) Second Amendment Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
